name: Raspberry Marzipan Coffee Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Prepare Streusel by cutting margarine into flour and sugar until crumbly. Stir in nuts.
3. Grease a square pan, 9x9x2 inches.
4. In a medium bowl on low speed for 30 seconds, beat all ingredients except almond paste, raspberries, and Streusel.
5. Beat on medium speed for 2 minutes, scraping the bowl occasionally.
6. Spread half of the batter in the pan. Sprinkle with half each of the almond paste, raspberries, and Streusel.
7. Repeat layers.
8. Bake for about 50 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
Raspberry-Chocolate Coffee Cake:
Substitute 1 - 6 ounce package semisweet chocolate chips for the almond paste.
